meta.siteDescription: Installation, cleaning and service for air conditioning, heating, heat pumps and MaR systems with individual equipment selection for each property.

home.eyebrow: Climate service for homes and business
home.headline: Air conditioning, heating and heat pump service with equipment selected around your property and daily needs.
home.subheadline: Installation, cleaning and long-term service for air conditioners, heating, heat pumps and MaR control systems, with individual equipment selection based on room size, usage, budget and efficiency goals.
home.servicesText: Practical service support for homes and businesses, with clear recommendations and individual equipment selection for each project.
home.whyTitle: Why clients choose Karpan Climate Service
whyItems: Fast digital communication via WhatsApp and email
Service built around comfort, efficiency and reliability

processItems.title: Request
processItems.text: You send a short request with service type, preferred time and basic details.

processItems.title: Confirmation
processItems.text: We review the request and confirm scope, timing and next steps.

processItems.title: On-site work
processItems.text: Installation, cleaning or servicing is delivered with care and technical precision.

processItems.title: Support
processItems.text: After the visit, communication stays clear for maintenance and follow-up needs.

home.bookingText: Send the basics of your property and needs, and we will suggest a suitable solution, service scope and next step.
home.aboutTitle: Climate and heating solutions tailored to the client, the property and the required performance
home.aboutText: Karpan Climate Service helps clients choose air conditioning, heating and heat pump equipment that fits the space, workload, noise expectations and energy priorities. The focus is not on generic packages, but on solutions that make sense for the real conditions on site.
home.brandText: We work with equipment from leading global brands and help clients choose the right solution for the property, the expected load and the preferred budget instead of pushing one fixed option.
home.heroDescription: We install and service systems that are selected for the actual layout, usage pattern and comfort expectations of the client.
home.heroCoreFocusText: Installation, service, heating, heat pumps and individual equipment selection.
home.heroLeadPathText: WhatsApp, email and a service request form for fast consultation and tailored recommendations.

servicesPage.headline: Air conditioning, heating and control systems with selection, installation and service based on real site conditions.
servicesPage.text: We help clients compare options, choose suitable equipment and get reliable installation and maintenance for homes, offices and technical premises.

installation.title: Air conditioner installation
installation.excerpt: Split and multi-split installation with correct sizing, tidy execution and equipment selected for the space.

cleaning.title: Air conditioner cleaning
cleaning.excerpt: Deep cleaning focused on hygiene, indoor air quality and restoring stable system performance.

service.title: Air conditioner service
service.excerpt: Diagnostics, preventive maintenance and repair support for dependable everyday operation.

heating.title: Heating systems
heating.excerpt: Heating support and equipment recommendations matched to the building and expected usage.

heatPumps.title: Heat pumps
heatPumps.excerpt: Heat pump solutions selected around efficiency, property type and long-term running costs.

mar.title: MaR / control systems
mar.excerpt: Measurement and control solutions for stable operation, visibility and smarter system management.

installation.title: Air conditioner installation
installation.intro: Installation with correct sizing, careful placement and equipment selected for the client's rooms, load and comfort expectations.
body: We treat installation as part of the building system, not as a rushed one-day job. Placement, routing and finishing affect comfort, noise level, energy use and long-term reliability.
Before installation, we help choose an air conditioner or multi-split setup that matches the size of the rooms, insulation level, usage pattern and the client's budget.

cleaning.title: Air conditioner cleaning
cleaning.intro: Regular cleaning protects indoor air quality, efficiency and the general condition of the unit.
body: Cleaning is treated as a key maintenance step that protects hygiene, airflow and system efficiency throughout the season.
Regular cleaning also helps the client keep the selected equipment working closer to its intended performance and extends service life.

service.title: Air conditioner service / maintenance
service.intro: Preventive and corrective service to keep systems stable, efficient and dependable.
body: We handle diagnostics, seasonal servicing and ongoing maintenance for systems in homes, offices and smaller commercial spaces.
If a unit is underperforming, we assess whether servicing, adjustment or equipment replacement is the right next step for the client.

heating.title: Heating systems
heating.intro: Heating support built around comfort, system stability and practical efficiency.
body: We support heating systems with practical service, inspection and recommendations based on the building type, comfort targets and running efficiency.
When needed, we help the client choose equipment upgrades or replacements that better fit the property and daily use.

heatPumps.title: Heat pumps
heatPumps.intro: Efficient heat pump solutions with a clear focus on comfort, performance and modern operation.
body: Heat pumps need proper planning and realistic sizing. We help clients choose a system that fits the property, insulation standard, hot water demand and expected operating costs.
The result is a solution selected for long-term efficiency, stable comfort and serviceable operation rather than a generic product recommendation.

mar.title: MaR / control systems
mar.intro: Measurement and regulation systems that improve visibility, control and operational consistency.
body: Measurement and control systems help the client keep HVAC and heating equipment stable, transparent and easier to manage.
We adapt regulation logic and control components to the actual system setup so the selected equipment works together predictably.

about.headline: Technical service and equipment selection built around the client, the property and long-term reliability.
body: Karpan Climate Service works with clients who want clean execution, honest recommendations and equipment that matches real operating conditions instead of generic sales packages.

The service scope includes installation, cleaning, maintenance, heating systems, heat pumps and MaR support, with individual equipment selection based on property type, room layout, comfort expectations and budget.
about.brandText: We are not tied to a single manufacturer. We work with products from major international brands and help select the solution that best fits the property, the technical task and the client's expectations.

contact.headline: Send a service request
contact.text: Choose the service type, preferred date and contact channel, and tell us about the property so we can prepare a suitable recommendation and next step.
contact.legal: Full company details and legal information are available on the legal pages and can be provided directly on request.

form.name: Name
form.success: Your request has been sent successfully.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.dateRequired: Please choose an available day before sending the request.
form.placeholderMessage: Describe the property, room size, current system or what kind of equipment and service you need.
form.calendarHelper: Only available days can be selected. Unmarked days are unavailable.
form.calendarEmpty: No free days are currently marked in this month.

consent.title: Analytics only with consent
consent.text: We use privacy-friendly first-party analytics to understand visits and clicks. Analytics are activated only after you agree.

legal.privacyIntro: This website collects only the data required to respond to service requests and, if consent is given, privacy-friendly analytics data for website improvement.
legal.cookieIntro: This website uses essential cookies for basic functionality and optional analytics storage only after consent.
legal.cookieEssential: Essential storage is used only for language routing and cookie preference state. Optional analytics storage is disabled until the user explicitly opts in.
legal.cookieAnalytics: The analytics implementation in this project is first-party and focused on aggregate usage: visits, views, CTA clicks, languages, sources and device type.
legal.cookieChoice: Users can refuse optional analytics and continue browsing the website without any reduction in core functionality.
legal.privacyBooking: We process booking request data to respond to enquiries and organize requested services. Data is retained only for the period reasonably required for follow-up and legal obligations.
legal.privacyAnalytics: Where consent is granted, we process privacy-friendly analytics data such as page visits, button clicks, languages and device categories. No advertising profiling is enabled by default in this project.
legal.privacyRights: Users may request access, correction or deletion of personal data as permitted by applicable EU and Slovak law.

footer.tagline: Installation, cleaning and service for climate systems with individual equipment selection for homes and businesses.

stats.headline: Website statistics
stats.availabilityText: Mark the days that are open for bookings. Clients can only choose the days marked as available here.
